start: ^CAS Personel: The art of science? Or the science of art?
continue_1: ^CAS Personel: Welcome to the College of Arts and Sciences.
continue_2: ^CAS Personel: This college provides instruction in the liberal arts and pure sciences.
continue_3: ^CAS Personel: These include the humanities, social sciences, and natural sciences.
continue_4: ^CAS Personel: We offer Bachelor of Arts programs in Economics, English Language, Sociology, Philosophy, and Mathematics.
continue_5: ^CAS Personel: We also offer Bachelor of Science programs in Development Communication and Community Development.
continue_6: ^CAS Personel: Additional programs include Biology, major in Biotechnology.
continue_7: ^CAS Personel: And Environmental Science, major in Environmental Heritage Studies.
